source: China Association of Chinese Medicine Standard - Classification and Determination of TCM Constitution

constitutions.name: 平和质
constitutions.summary: Harmony of yin, yang, qi, and blood, characterized by moderate body shape, ruddy complexion, and abundant energy

characteristics.overall: Moderate body shape, ruddy complexion, abundant energy, good organ function
characteristics.physical: Symmetrical and robust body shape, ruddy complexion, spirited eyes, lustrous hair, elastic muscles and skin
characteristics.psychological: Easygoing and cheerful personality, stable emotions, abundant energy, good sleep

bodyFeatures.complexion: Ruddy complexion and skin, dense and lustrous hair, bright and moist nose

susceptibleDiseases: Rarely falls ill under normal circumstances
healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Sufficient vital qi, strong resistance, not easily affected by external pathogens
seasonalSensitivity: Strong adaptability to natural and social environments

diet.principles: Diet should be light, avoid partial eating, maintain nutritional balance

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a peaceful mindset, smooth emotions

constitutions.name: 气虚质
constitutions.summary: Deficiency of primordial qi, characterized by fatigue, shortness of breath, spontaneous sweating, and other qi deficiency manifestations

characteristics.overall: Deficiency of primordial qi, decreased organ function, shortness of breath and reluctance to speak, easy fatigue
characteristics.physical: Flabby and soft muscles, weak voice, shortness of breath and reluctance to speak, easy sweating
characteristics.psychological: Introverted personality, dislikes adventure, lack of spirit

bodyFeatures.complexion: Slightly yellow or pale complexion, easy to sweat
bodyFeatures.tongueBody: Pale red tongue with teeth marks on edges

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Prone to common cold, visceral prolapse, etc., slow recovery after illness
seasonalSensitivity: Intolerant of wind, cold, heat, and damp pathogens

diet.principles: Eat foods that tonify qi and strengthen spleen, avoid foods that break qi or consume qi

recommendations.emotional: Avoid excessive worry, maintain a cheerful mood

constitutions.name: 阳虚质
constitutions.summary: Deficiency of yang qi, characterized by fear of cold, cold hands and feet, and other deficiency cold manifestations

characteristics.overall: Deficiency of yang qi, internal generation of deficiency cold, fear of cold, cold hands and feet
characteristics.physical: Flabby and soft muscles, fear of cold and cold limbs, preference for warm foods
characteristics.psychological: Mostly quiet and introverted personality, lack of spirit

bodyFeatures.bodyType: Flabby and soft muscles, often obese

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: When infected, tends to transform into cold patterns, prone to cold and deficiency syndromes
healthTendencies.seasonalSensitivity: Tolerant of summer but not winter, easily affected by wind, cold, and damp pathogens

diet.principles: Eat warm and hot foods, avoid raw and cold foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a happy mood, avoid excessive worry, sorrow, fear

constitutions.name: 阴虚质
constitutions.summary: Deficiency of yin fluids, characterized by dry mouth and throat, heat in palms and soles, and other deficiency heat manifestations

characteristics.overall: Insufficient yin fluids, internal generation of deficiency heat, dry mouth and throat, heat in palms and soles
characteristics.physical: Slightly thin body shape, heat in palms and soles, dry mouth and throat, slightly dry nose
characteristics.psychological: Impetuous temperament, extroverted and active, lively

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: When infected, tends to transform into heat patterns, prone to deficiency heat syndromes
seasonalSensitivity: Tolerant of winter but not summer
intolerant of heat, hot, and dry pathogens

diet.principles: Eat foods that nourish yin and clear heat, avoid spicy and warm-dry foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a peaceful mindset, avoid impatience and anger

constitutions.name: 痰湿质
constitutions.summary: Phlegm-dampness accumulation, characterized by obesity, fullness in the abdomen, sticky mouth taste, greasy coating, and other phlegm-dampness manifestations

characteristics.overall: Internal accumulation of phlegm-dampness, obese body shape, fullness in the abdomen, sticky mouth taste, greasy coating
characteristics.physical: Obese body shape, full and soft abdomen, excessive facial oil, heavy and sticky sweating
characteristics.psychological: Gentle and steady personality, good at endurance

bodyFeatures.bodyType: Obese body shape, full and soft abdomen
bodyFeatures.complexion: Excessive facial oil, slightly puffy eyelids

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Prone to metabolic diseases, prolonged disease course
seasonalSensitivity: Poor adaptability to rainy season and humid environments

diet.principles: Eat foods that strengthen spleen and drain dampness, avoid rich and sweet greasy foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a cheerful mood, avoid excessive worry

constitutions.name: 湿热质
constitutions.summary: Internal accumulation of damp-heat, characterized by oily and dull complexion, bitter taste, yellow greasy coating, and other damp-heat manifestations

characteristics.overall: Internal accumulation of damp-heat, oily and dull complexion, bitter taste in mouth, dry mouth, heaviness and lethargy
characteristics.physical: Medium or slightly thin body shape, oily and dull complexion, prone to acne, bitter taste in mouth, dry mouth

bodyFeatures.bodyType: Medium or slightly thin body shape
bodyFeatures.complexion: Oily and dull complexion, prone to acne and blackheads

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Prone to damp-heat diseases, prolonged disease course
seasonalSensitivity: Poor adaptability to damp-heat climate in late summer and early autumn

diet.principles: Eat foods that clear heat and drain dampness, avoid spicy, dry, and hot foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a peaceful mindset, avoid impatience and anger

constitutions.name: 血瘀质
constitutions.summary: Poor blood circulation, characterized by dull skin color, purple dark tongue, and other blood stasis manifestations

characteristics.overall: Poor blood circulation, dull skin color, easy bruising, obvious pain
characteristics.physical: Both fat and thin body shapes, dull skin color, pigmentation, easy bruising

bodyFeatures.bodyType: Both fat and thin body shapes
bodyFeatures.complexion: Dull skin color, pigmentation, dull lip color
bodyFeatures.tongueBody: Dark tongue or with petechiae, purple and dark or thickened sublingual veins
bodyFeatures.tongueCoating: Thin white or thin yellow coating

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Prone to blood stasis syndromes, fixed pain

diet.principles: Eat foods that invigorate blood and resolve stasis, avoid cold and stagnating foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a happy mood, avoid depression and anger

constitutions.name: 气郁质
constitutions.summary: Qi stagnation, characterized by depression, anxiety, fragility, and other qi stagnation manifestations

characteristics.overall: Qi stagnation, depressed expression, anxiety and fragility, sensitive and suspicious
characteristics.physical: Mostly thin body shape, depressed expression, fragile emotions, unhappy and bored
characteristics.psychological: Introverted and unstable personality, sensitive and prone to worry

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Prone to emotional disorders, closely related to mental stimulation

diet.principles: Eat foods that soothe liver and regulate qi, avoid astringent and sour foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a cheerful mood, vent negative emotions in time, avoid excessive worry

constitutions.name: 特禀质
constitutions.summary: Congenital abnormality, characterized by physical defects, allergic reactions, etc.

characteristics.overall: Congenital abnormality, allergic constitution, prone to allergic reactions or congenital diseases
characteristics.physical: Those with allergic constitution often have asthma, wheals, throat itching, nasal congestion, sneezing, etc., or may have congenital deformities

bodyFeatures.bodyType: Those with allergic constitution have no special body features, those with congenital abnormalities may have deformities

healthTendencies.diseaseCharacteristics: Prone to allergic reactions, or has congenital or genetic diseases

diet.principles: Avoid allergens, light diet, avoid spicy, foul-smelling, and triggering foods

recommendations.emotional: Maintain a peaceful mindset, avoid excessive tension
